title: [codereview-pass3-3] coap_status.c Zephyr style and robustness
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_status.c: LOG_MODULE_REGISTER ok but many magic numbers in CBOR, no use of Zephyr CBOR library (tinycbor or zcbor). notify functions have incomplete observer handling. After removing comments, ensure no dead code left (the public notify funcs do little). Check for races in s_initialized.
close_reason: coap_status.c: added CBOR_* defines (no magic numbers), s_init_mutex for s_initialized (no race), removed dead public notify funcs (lichen_coap_status_notify etc did LOG_DBG only). Init checks combined, style matches coap_msg.c. P3 robustness fixed (no ZCBOR switch to avoid deps; defines are idiomatic here).
